queries: E2E pipeline Batch Processing with Apache Spark high-quality sources 2023
action.query: E2E pipeline Batch Processing with Apache Spark high-quality sources 2023

annotations.title: GitHub - airscholar/e2e-data-engineering: An end-to-end data engineering pipeline that orchestrates data ingestion, processing, and storage using Apache Airflow, Python, Apache Kafka, Apache Zookeeper, Apache Spark, and Cassandra. All components are containerized with Docker for easy deployment and scalability.
Spark Declarative Pipelines Programming Guide - Spark 4.1.1 Documentation
End-to-End Batch Data Pipeline with Spark - Mahdi Karabiben
Building Batch and Streaming Unified Pipelines in Spark | BinaryScripts
End-to-End Data Pipeline - Enterprise Data Engineering Platform
Spark in Production: Batch ETL and Streaming at Scale | Spark Architecture & Execution Model - System Overflow
Large-scale text processing pipeline with Apache Spark
Architectural Impact on Performance of In-memory Data Analytics: Apache Spark Case Study

content.text:
Here are several authoritative and recent sources on building end-to-end (E2E) batch processing pipelines with Apache Spark:

1. **GitHub Repository: airscholar/e2e-data-engineering**
   - *Description*: This repository provides a comprehensive guide to constructing an end-to-end data engineering pipeline. It utilizes Apache Airflow for orchestration, Apache Kafka and Zookeeper for streaming, Apache Spark for data processing, and Cassandra for storage. All components are containerized using Docker for easy deployment and scalability.
   - *Access*: ([github.com](https://github.com/airscholar/e2e-data-engineering?utm_source=openai))

2. **Spark Declarative Pipelines Programming Guide**
   - *Description*: The official Spark documentation introduces Spark Declarative Pipelines (SDP), a framework designed for building reliable, maintainable, and testable data pipelines. SDP simplifies ETL development by allowing users to focus on data transformations rather than the mechanics of pipeline execution. It supports both batch and streaming data processing.
   - *Access*: ([spark.apache.org](https://spark.apache.org/docs/4.1.1/declarative-pipelines-programming-guide.html?utm_source=openai))

3. **End-to-End Batch Data Pipeline with Spark**
   - *Description*: This liveProject series by Mahdi Karabiben offers a hands-on approach to building a batch data pipeline using Apache Spark. It covers data ingestion, transformation, and storage, providing practical experience with Spark's capabilities in handling large-scale data processing.
   - *Access*: ([manning.com](https://www.manning.com/liveprojectseries/batch-data-pipeline-with-spark?utm_source=openai))

4. **Building Batch and Streaming Unified Pipelines in Spark**
   - *Description*: This article explores the creation of unified data pipelines for both batch and streaming workloads using Apache Spark. It discusses key techniques, best practices, and real-world examples, emphasizing the integration of batch and streaming data processing within a single pipeline.
   - *Access*: ([binaryscripts.com](https://binaryscripts.com/spark/2024/12/19/building-batch-and-streaming-unified-pipelines-in-spark.html?utm_source=openai))

5. **End-to-End Data Pipeline - Enterprise Data Engineering Platform**
   - *Description*: This resource outlines a comprehensive, production-ready data pipeline that integrates batch and streaming processing. It emphasizes enterprise-grade monitoring, governance, and machine learning capabilities, providing insights into building robust data pipelines with Apache Spark.
   - *Access*: ([hoangsonww.github.io](https://hoangsonww.github.io/End-to-End-Data-Pipeline/?utm_source=openai))

6. **Spark in Production: Batch ETL and Streaming at Scale**
   - *Description*: This article discusses the deployment of Spark in production environments, focusing on batch ETL and streaming at scale. It provides insights into real-world deployments, including architecture, execution models, and performance considerations.
   - *Access*: ([systemoverflow.com](https://www.systemoverflow.com/learn/distributed-processing/spark-architecture/spark-in-production-batch-etl-and-streaming-at-scale?utm_source=openai))

7. **Large-scale Text Processing Pipeline with Apache Spark**
   - *Description*: This academic paper evaluates Apache Spark for a data-intensive machine learning problem, focusing on policy diffusion detection across state legislatures. It provides an implementation of this analysis workflow as a distributed text processing pipeline with Spark dataframes and Scala API.
   - *Access*: ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/1912.00547?utm_source=openai))

8. **Architectural Impact on Performance of In-memory Data Analytics: Apache Spark Case Study**
   - *Description*: This study compares the micro-architectural performance of batch processing and stream processing workloads in Apache Spark. It discusses the impact of data locality, prefetching, and executor configurations on performance, providing insights into optimizing Spark applications.
   - *Access*: ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/1604.08484?utm_source=openai))

These resources offer a solid foundation for understanding and implementing end-to-end batch processing pipelines with Apache Spark.
